3074390.name: Built By Force
3074390.description:
INTERESTED IN PLAYING THE CURRENT DEVELOPMENT BUILD FOR FREE!? 

Join the discord for instant access and to shape the game as we grow it together!

---

MarineMaaan, the solo developer, gave up a career in medicine to pursue his dream of becoming a pokem- wait I mean, to dedicate himself to creating this game, Built By Force!

---

Built By Force is a carefully orchestrated merging between the gunplay of first-movement person shooters, base building in real-time strategies, and exploration of open world games, while introducing new elements of its own.

You and your friends will find a randomized world consisting of a living simulation: randomized events each playthrough, completely malleable environments, and an adaptive AI to challenge your ability to adapt and overcome!

"IT'S A BRAND NEW GAME"

With the amount of random, but curated, content, each run is a refreshing new experience.

"HEY FRIEND. GET IN HERE!"

Enjoy your new world with up to 12 other players!

"CAN YOU JUST MOVE THAT MOUNTAIN A LITTLE TO THE LEFT?"

Terrain is fully destructible and constructible!

"WAIT, DID THAT JUST BREAK WHERE I TOUCHED IT?"

Runtime destruction means structures break WHERE YOU HIT THEM!

"GOTTA GO FASTER! GOTTA GO...SENTRIER?"

Break the sound barrier in flight mode, stand your ground in Sentry mode, or have a familiar stroll in Humanoid mode as you can quickly transform at will to adapt to your situation.

"OUT OF MANY ONE!"

A simplified resource management system where you only have to manage a single resource type! CRYSTAL POWER!

"NOW THAT IS BESPOKE!"

Freely adapt your playstyle with tool and ability customization.

"THIS BASE IS MY BASE. YOUR BASE IS MY BASE."

Base building is a smooth experience with a third person camera to allow you to quickly build that dream without getting caught up in the legwork.
